title: 30o: BlobUploadResponse missing #[non_exhaustive]
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs: BlobUploadResponse is a server-defined response shape (RFC 8620 §6.1) and is missing #[non_exhaustive], while BlobLookupEntry and BlobLookupResponse in methods/blob.rs both carry it. Inconsistency: future spec additions to the upload response shape (e.g., a new integrity field) would silently be dropped on deserialization without the attribute flagging the pattern difference at review time.
